_doc: Per-field downstream blast radius (Phase A of INTERACTIVE_LINEAGE_ROADMAP). display_fanout = surfaces that DISPLAY the field's terminus table (auto, complete). causal_cascades = curated cross-page write-cascades (seed, expand).
